title: cenocline pauciflora
intro: Cenocline pauciflora, also known as the few-flowered Cenocline, is a plant species belonging to the Bignoniaceae family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues and fever. The leaves and stems of Cenocline pauciflora have been found to have anti-inflammatory and expectorant properties, which provide relief from coughs and colds, as well as other respiratory problems. Herbal preparations of Cenocline pauciflora can be made into teas or infusions for consumption, and it is also used in some traditional remedies to aid in digestion and reduce fever.
